seo.title: Dashboard
seo.description: Track your balance, frequent contacts, and latest transfers in your Onda Finance account.

frequentContactsDescription: Recipients calculated from the real transfer history to speed up new transfers.
emptyContactsDescription: As soon as you make transfers, the most recurring recipients will appear here for quick access.
emptyDescription: As soon as you send a transfer, it will appear here among the three most recent records.
